scenario: Illustrative mock filer: a registered owner renewing an ordinary private vehicle's licence (rego) for 6 months online, by credit card, with a current WoF. The plate number is fabricated test data, not a real vehicle.

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (nz/nzta/vehicle-licence-renewal). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to NZTA or any government system, and the plate/reminder numbers above are fabricated examples, not a real vehicle record — NZTA's own online renewal wizard (transact.nzta.govt.nz/v2/vehicle-licence-renewal) requires a genuine plate/reminder number and payment, so this schema's author stopped at the real Step 1 screen without entering one (see VERIFICATION.md). A human (the registered owner) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize payment through NZTA's own channel (https://www.nzta.govt.nz/) before this renewal is submitted. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
